episodes.title: Ancient Rome's Cruellest Cult
episodes.description:
Who was the goddess Cybele, also known as Magna Mater? Why was her mystery cult so cruel?

#ancientrome #historydocumentary #history 

*All text, images and audio in this video are human made. For that reason you may notice some pronunciation errors at the start. It should be 'SI-BA-LEE'. Sorry. It's the human touch :)

Sources:

Prudentius, Crowns of Martyrdom
Julian, Oratio 5
Synesius, Letters
Cattalus, Poem 63
Hippolytus, Against the Heretics

Jacob Latham, Roman Masculinity and the Cult of Magna Mater
Lynn Roller, The Cult of Anatolian Cybele

episodes.title: Why We Don't Understand Mithraism
episodes.description:
The Cult of Mithras remains one of the great mysteries of the ancient Roman world. What did they actually believe?

#historydocumentary #history #ancientrome 

Plutarch, Parallel Lives
Porphyry, On the Cave of Nymphs
Inscriptions in the Prisca Mithraeum, Rome
Mithraic Catechism, P.Berol. 21196
Mystery Cult Oath,  PSI 1162
The Mithras Liturgy, Greek Magical Papyri
Jerome, Letter to Laeta
Commodian, Instructiones (I have adapted the translation to make it rhyme)

episodes.title: Ancient Rome's Cult of Madness
episodes.description:
The Mystery Cult of Bacchus spread across the Roman world. But how did an empire built on discipline and order tolerate this chaotic cult?

#historydocumentary #ancientrome #history 

All images, text and audio in this video are human made.

N.B. I've had to cut or zoom in on some of the shots to keep the advertisers happy.

Primary sources:

Livy, From the Founding of the City
Cicero, On the Nature of the Gods
Euripides, The Cretans
Euripides, The Bacchae
The Hymns of Orpheus
The Anacreontea
The Derveni Papyrus
Pliny the Elder, Natural History
Emperor Julian's Letter to Heracleios
Polyaenus, Strategem's of War
Nonnus, The Dionysiaca

episodes.title: The Cult that Took Over Rome
episodes.description:
The Mysteries of the goddess Isis were one of the most important cults in Ancient Rome. But how did an Egyptian deity end up there? 

#historydocumentary #ancientrome #history 

All text, images and audio in this video are human made (no AI).

Primary Sources (all available online in English):

Isis and Osiris, Plutarch
The Golden Ass, Apuleius
The Thunder Perfect Mind, Nag Hammadi Library (I rephrased my quotations from this poem to make them rhyme)
The Ethiopian, Heliodorus
Ephesian Tale, Xenophon

episodes.title: The Religion the World Forgot
episodes.description:
The rise, fall (and rise again?) of the religion of light: Manichaenism. 

Music, images and text used in this video are human made.

#historydocumentary 

Manichaen scripture quoted in this video comes from:

Concerning the Origin of his Body
A Manichaean psalm-book. Part II
